ddls:
CREATE TABLE "funds" (
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund */,
  "fund_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund */,
  "latest_nav" REAL /* Latest Net Asset Value (NAV) of the fund */,
  "returns_1y" REAL /* One-year returns of the fund */,
  "fund_assets" TEXT /* Total assets of the fund */,
  "expense_ratio" REAL /* Expense ratio of the fund */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level of the fund (e.g., High, Average, Below Average) */,
  "fund_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund category */,
  "fund_type" TEXT /* Type of fund (e.g., Open-ended, Close-ended) */,
  "investment_objective" TEXT /* Investment objective of the fund */,
  "minimum_investment" TEXT /* Minimum investment required for the fund */,
  "exit_load" TEXT /* Exit load for the fund */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date of creation of the fund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_funds_fund_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_category_id") REFERENCES fund_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fund manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the fund manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fund manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the fund manager */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the fund manager */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Qualification of the fund manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_manager_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund being managed */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund manager assigned to the fund */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_manager_assignments_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_manager_assignments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES fund_managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investors" (
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investor */,
  "investor_name" TEXT /* Name of the investor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the investor */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the investor */,
  "pan" TEXT /* PAN number of the investor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the investor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investments" (
  "investment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor making the investment */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund being invested in */,
  "investment_date" TEXT /* Date of the investment */,
  "investment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the investment */,
  "units_purchased" TEXT /* Number of units purchased */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("investment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investments_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund being reviewed */,
  "investor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the investor giving the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the investor (1-5) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_reviews_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_reviews_investor_id FOREIGN KEY ("investor_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance record */,
  "nav" TEXT /* Net Asset Value (NAV) of the fund */,
  "returns_1d" TEXT /* One-day returns of the fund */,
  "returns_1w" TEXT /* One-week returns of the fund */,
  "returns_1m" TEXT /* One-month returns of the fund */,
  "returns_3m" TEXT /* Three-month returns of the fund */,
  "returns_6m" TEXT /* Six-month returns of the fund */,
  "returns_1y" TEXT /* One-year returns of the fund */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_performance_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_holding" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund */,
  "security_id" INTEGER /* ID of the security held */,
  "security_type" TEXT /* Type of security held (e.g., stock, bond) */,
  "holding_date" TEXT /* Date of the holding */,
  "holding_value" TEXT /* Value of the holding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_holding_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being assigned to a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES investors ("investor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fund_dividends" (
  "dividend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dividend record */,
  "fund_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fund */,
  "declaration_date" TEXT /* Date of dividend declaration */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of record */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of dividend payment */,
  "dividend_amount" TEXT /* Dividend amount per unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dividend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fund_dividends_fund_id FOREIGN KEY ("fund_id") REFERENCES funds ("fund_id")
)
